acceptance_gates.interpretation: The gate consumes the support-aware spoofer boundary.
Every attacked public transcript gets late-bound private predicate commitments.
Without the private predicate, support-aware spoofers must guess predicate bits.
If predicate material leaks, the private-predicate protection degrades.
No real backend properties or hardware execution are used.
This is an analytic pressure gate, not a cryptographic proof.
The result adds a verifier-private burden but does not prove protocol soundness.
The report keeps hardware, hardness, soundness, advantage, and BQP claims false.

claim_boundary.next_gate: Replace analytic private predicates with a formal challenge protocol or real backend/hardware transcript, then attack leakage and learned spoofers again.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not hardware execution, not cryptographic soundness, not protocol soundness, not sampling hardness, not quantum advantage, and not BQP separation.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Adding hidden verifier-private predicate bits turns the support-only acceptance of the tested spoofers from 1.0 into a 1/16 guessing burden.
